resolution.note: Flipped tag_concepts --resume to default-on (BooleanOptionalAction). Re-runs now skip chunks already in tagging_progress, so tagging is idempotent by default and won't redo/clobber prior work; --no-resume forces a full re-tag. --respect-reviewed was already default-on (adjudicated tags protected). Extracted build_parser() + added test_resume_is_on_by_default. Commit 9f302b5; 263 tests green. This is the user's chosen mitigation for the enoch/tertium curation-protection concern — supersedes the proposed frozen-guard / debt ticket.
